rulings.Case Title: OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BRUCE I. GILBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Certain Plaintiffs Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion To: 1) Disqualify Sunset Scavenger'S Counsel And 2) Disqualify Sunset Scavenger'S Expert Witness, Dr. Paul Gantt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 4, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF OREGON MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY, SENTINEL INSURANCE COMPANY LTD. A FOREIGN, FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE A CALIFORNIA, GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE GROUP A/S/O COLE HARDWARE, ROBERTO SANCHEZ, JUANITA SANCHEZ, WESTCHESTER SURPLUS LINES INSURANCE COMPANY Certain Plaintiffs Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion To: 1) Disqualify Sunset Scavenger'S Counsel And 2) Disqualify Sunset Scavenger'S Expert Witness, Dr. Paul Gantt is continued to October 2, 2020 to be heard with other pending motion(s). The Court may require an evidentiary hearing at that time. All declarants to be prepared to testify. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LUZ BALMES ET AL VS. ARNOLD GARY BALMES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 4, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF LUZ BALMES, ARTURO BALMES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment is continued to September 18, 2020 per stipulation and order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHIKODI CHIMA VS. KRISTIN F. WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended DEMURRER to 1ST Amended CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 4, 2020 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT CHIKODI CHIMA Amended DEMURRER to 1ST Amended CROSS COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of contract is OVERRULED. Cross-Complaint raises issues of fact that cannot be addressed on a demurrer. Demurrer to the cause of action for declaratory relief is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege an actual present controversy for which a declaration is sought.=(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HAPPY 42ND AVE PARTNERS LLC VS. JODY TELLIER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Special Interrogatories Set No.1; Request For Production Of Documents Set No. 1 Propounded On Jodi Tellier; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 4, 2020 line 4. PLAINTIFF HAPPY 42ND AVE PARTNERS LLC Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Special Interrogatories Set No.1; Request For Production Of Documents Set No. 1 Propounded On Jodi Tellier; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of Points And Authorities is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $500. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: GWENDOLYN BROWN VS. CARL ROBINSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order: 1. Waiving Defendant Carl Robinson'S Objections; 2. Deeming The First Sset Of Requests For Admissions Served On Defendant Carl Robinson Admitted; And 3. Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 4, 2020 line 5. PLAINTIFF GWENDOLYN BROWN Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order: 1. Waiving Defendant Carl Robinson'S Objections; 2. Deeming The First Sset Of Requests For Admissions Served On Defendant Carl Robinson Admitted; And 3. Sanctions is GRANTED as follows: admissions are deemed admitted and sanctions are granted in the amount of $500. =(501/CFH)
